pro-tuner.description: Find and fix any accessibility issues in the tuner UI — missing aria labels, keyboard navigation, color contrast.
Write unit tests for the audio processing / pitch detection logic. Cover edge cases like silence, noise, and out-of-range frequencies.
Add input validation to ensure the reference frequency (A4) is within a reasonable range (400-480 Hz) and show a warning if out of range.
Review the main tuner component for code duplication. Extract repeated logic into helper functions without changing behavior.

games-project.description: Check the Django views for proper error handling — missing try/except, unvalidated user input, or missing CSRF protection.
Write Django unit tests for the main game models. Test model creation, validation, and any custom methods.
Add proper Django model field validators (MinValueValidator, MaxValueValidator) where numeric fields are used without bounds.
Add docstrings to all Django views that are missing them. Include purpose, parameters, and return values.

homemusic.description: Review the Django settings for security issues — DEBUG mode, ALLOWED_HOSTS, SECRET_KEY exposure, missing security middleware.
Write tests for the API endpoints. Test both valid requests and error cases (404, 400, invalid data).
Find any Django views using raw SQL queries and convert them to use the ORM properly. Ensure no SQL injection risk.

chord-library.description: Check for any unhandled promise rejections or missing error handling in async functions.
Add JSON schema validation for chord data input. Ensure all required fields are present and have correct types.
Write unit tests for the chord transposition logic. Cover all 12 keys and both sharp/flat notation.

cookbook.description: Check all Django forms for proper input sanitization. Ensure no XSS vulnerabilities in user-submitted content.
Add pagination to any list views that don't have it. Use Django's built-in Paginator with 20 items per page.
Write tests for the recipe model — creation, required fields, string representation, and any custom methods.

vocabulary.description: Review the API views for proper authentication checks. Ensure unauthenticated users cannot access protected endpoints.
Find any repeated database queries in views (N+1 problem) and optimize with select_related or prefetch_related.
Write integration tests for the vocabulary quiz/practice flow — creating a session, answering questions, scoring.

jarvis-agent.description: Check error handling in the agent's tool execution pipeline. Ensure tool failures are caught, logged, and don't crash the agent.
Write unit tests for the message parsing and routing logic. Test with various message formats and edge cases.
Review the agent's main loop for memory leaks — unclosed event listeners, growing arrays, unreferenced timers.

nex-code.description: Review cli/providers/ollama.js for HTTP error handling gaps. Ensure status codes are preserved and meaningful error messages are returned.
Write tests for the autoFixPath function in cli/tools/index.js. Cover all 5 strategies with various path formats.
Review cli/context-engine.js compression phases. Find any inefficiencies where cheap compression could save more tokens before hitting LLM compactor.
Add better error messages when Ollama Cloud returns rate limit errors (429). Include retry-after header info if available.

biohonig.description: Check all Django templates for proper escaping of user-generated content. Fix any XSS vulnerabilities.
Add meta tags (description, og:image, og:title) to the main pages for better SEO and social sharing.

schoensgibl.description: Check the responsive CSS — find any layout breaks on mobile (320px viewport) and fix them.
Write Django tests for the contact form — valid submission, invalid email, missing required fields, CSRF token.
